content.body:
Implements the Transponder package (cli/internal/transponder/) with all 5
event types (SessionEvent, CaptureEvent, MemoryMutation, ConsumptionEvent,
RuntimeHealth), per-UTC-day file rotation, atomic O_APPEND writes, a no-op
disabled path, and graceful error handling (warn-log, never panic).

Tests cover all event round-trips, day rotation, disabled emitter, read-only
dir, and multi-event append.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(transponder): add local-only JSONL telemetry emitter
